positive: A whimsical watercolor illustration of a forest floor filled with glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate ferns, and tiny woodland creatures. Soft pastel palette, detailed linework, storybook aesthetic, ultra-detailed, trending on ArtStation.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, digital painting, photorealistic
